title: Sheep Armor
description: Grants sheep a small armor bonus while they still have their wool.
body:
This mod grants sheep a small armor bonus while they still have their wool. Shearing a sheep will remove the bonus until the wool has regrown. This extra armor can help your wooly friends survive longer against wolf attacks, stray arrows, and unexpected creeper blasts. By default they will have three armor points, which is the same as a leather chestplate.

## Configuration
The config file will allow you to change the amount of armor given to sheep. Look in your config folder for the sheeparmor.json file after running the game at least once with the mod installed. The default value is 3.0 which is equivalent to a leather chestplate. For best results the value should be between 0 and 30.
